description: Immerse yourself in our empowering email template designed for activism and anti-racism movements. This template is ideal for disseminating newsletters and magazine features focused on tackling social issues and promoting love over hate. It's perfect for non-profit organizations seeking to rally support, spread awareness and inspire change. The design resonates with the message of unity, equality and peace. With its intuitive layout, it allows you to share news updates, upcoming events, and inspiring stories effectively. This email template is more than just a communication tool, it's a platform for change, and a beacon for those striving to stop the hate and promote love. Harness the power of this template, and let's make a difference together.
short_description: Experience our empowering email template designed for activism, anti-racism, and non-profit organizations. Perfect for newsletters and magazines, it promotes love over hate, allowing effective sharing of news, events, and inspiring stories. Let's make a difference together.

designer.description:
Graphic Design is at the heart of my story, but I’ve been known to write myself a new part now and again… happily and frequently embracing such roles as: Project Manager, Strategic Thinker, Visual Communicator, Copy Writer, Brand Stylist and Content Curator... magician.

Design is where my passion and my purpose intersect, and providing clients with “the goods” to help their businesses soar is a pretty amazing thing to hop outta’ bed and do each day!
